samples.notes: indload.c:107 contains "newmind = here->INDinduct/m;" matching the claim "newmind = L/m" exactly.
bjtload.c:499 assigns dqbdvc=q1*qb*here->BJTtinvEarlyVoltF; lines 512 and 515 contain alternate dqbdvc assignments. All three match the claim referencing dqb/dVbc at (,512,515).
bjtload.c:561-563 contains the exact mode-gating pattern: (MODETRAN|MODEAC) || (MODETRANOP&&MODEUIC) || MODEINITSMSIG, matching the claim verbatim.
mos1load.c:131-141 contains DrainSatCur and SourceSatCur assignments scaled by here->MOS1m, matching the claim about drain/source saturation currents scaled by M.
mos1load.c:205-225 opens with #ifndef PREDICTOR guard and contains the predictor step code block with comment "predictor step", matching the claim.
mos1load.c:641-694 contains the bulk-drain depletion capacitance and charge computation (MOS1qbd, MOS1capbd), matching the claim about bulk-drain depletion cap + charge.
jfetload.c:534-550 contains the Y-matrix stamp block (comment: "load y matrix") with all JFET conductance stamps. JFET has no separate RD/RS resistance sub-nodes; gdpr/gspr are stamped directly.
dioload.c:261-263 contains the breakdown branch: evrev=exp(-(DIOtBrkdwnV+vd)/vtebrk); cdb=-csat*evrev; gdb=csat*evrev/vtebrk. Matches breakdown citation.
spalloc.c:192 assigns Matrix->RelThreshold = DEFAULT_THRESHOLD, matching the claim about pivot relative threshold.
dctran.c:553-554 contains AlmostEqualUlps(ckt->CKTtime, ckt->CKTbreaks[0], 100) matching the claim exactly.
